titles.title: Since Jesus Came into My Heart

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Since Jesus came into my heart, Since Jesus came into my heart; Floods of joy o'er my soul like the sea billows roll, Since Jesus came into my heart.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I have ceased from my wand'ring and going astray, Since Jesus came into my heart; And my sins which were many are all washed away, Since Jesus came into my heart.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm possessed of a hope that is steadfast and sure, Since Jesus came into my heart; And no dark clouds of doubt now my pathway obscure, Since Jesus came into my heart.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There's a light in the valley of death now for me, Since Jesus came into my heart; And the gates of the City beyond I can see, Since Jesus came into my heart.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I shall go there to dwell in that City I know, Since Jesus came into my heart; And I'm happy, so happy as onward I go, Since Jesus came into my heart.
